<!-- Thanks for sending a PR! Please fill in the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / CLI subcommand
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] CI / build

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? At minimum: -->

- [ ] `swift build` passes
- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] Windows smoke passes (`scripts\smoke-test-windows.ps1`) if Windows-facing
- [ ] Manually exercised on macOS (describe steps)

## Screenshots / transcripts (optional)

<!-- For UI-touching changes, paste a short transcript of an MCP exchange or
     CLI session showing the before/after. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Added or updated tests where reasonable
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `README.ja.md` if user-visible
